statement: Nonnegative finite repaired forms pass to a nonnegative closed lower-semicontinuous form on the completed augmented trace-fiber domain and transported trace quotient X_aug.

moscoLimsupInputStatus.label: Mosco limsup input
moscoLimsupInputStatus.reason: Recovery sequences give the correct upper envelope on the dense graph core.

moscoLiminfInputStatus.label: Mosco liminf input
moscoLiminfInputStatus.reason: Weak graph compactness and lower semicontinuity give the closed lower envelope.

traceRepairDescentInputStatus.label: trace repair descent input
traceRepairDescentInputStatus.reason: Finite trace repairs descend to a well-defined closed repair form on X_aug.

closedFormLowerSemicontinuityStatus.label: closed-form lower semicontinuity
closedFormLowerSemicontinuityStatus.reason: The Mosco limsup/liminf pair identifies the closed-form limit, and the trace repair descent theorem places the repair on X_aug without losing nonnegativity.

proof: Apply Mosco limsup to identify the correct closed envelope on recovery sequences.
Apply Mosco liminf to preserve nonnegativity under weak graph limits.
Use trace repair descent to interpret the limiting trace form as D_aug on X_aug.
Conclude the closed lower-semicontinuous repaired form is nonnegative.
